metadata.description: NeoGuard Monitoring — Assigns the built-in Reader role to a service principal so NeoGuard can discover resources and collect Azure Monitor metrics. No write permissions are granted. This is a subscription-level deployment.
The Object ID of your App Registration's Enterprise Application. Find it in Azure AD → Enterprise applications → search your app → Object ID.
Role definition ID for Reader role. The default is the built-in Azure Reader role — do not change this.

properties.description: NeoGuard monitoring platform — read-only access for resource discovery and metric collection
